svg.text: premium / calm · editorial-brand-story · motion: parallax-slow · palette: Amber
land the promise in one image and six words
state the belief the brand is built on, in its own voice
hold the reader inside one moment of the process
two facing panels: raw material, finished object
pinned-crossfade — first panel dissolves into the second while pinned
alternate proof and reflection down the page
put faces to the process — the second beat of the rhythm
show the range without narrating it
answer the price question without flinching
let the reader choose their own entry point
trace the object back to its origin
one line, one action, no noise
